solutions.title: SusCat-I
solutions.description: High-performance cationic polymer for industrial formulations requiring exceptional efficiency at low dosage levels

sliderImages.alt: SusCat-I Cationic Polymer product packaging bottle
SusCat-I industrial application in electroplating and metalworking fluids

details.overview: SusCat-I is a high-performance cationic polymer designed for industrial formulations requiring exceptional efficiency at low dosage levels. The product exhibits excellent water solubility and delivers superior performance across metalworking, electroplating, and oilfield applications.

specs.label: Appearance
specs.value: Clear to cloudy amber viscous liquid

specs.label: Performance
specs.value: Highly effective at very low dosage levels

solutions.title: VAMShield-90
solutions.description: Advanced ash-free corrosion inhibitor for multi-metal systems and high-performance industrial fluid applications
features: Low foaming for enhanced system efficiency
High compatibility with hard water systems
Reduces maintenance and extends equipment life

sliderImages.alt: VAMShield-90 ash-free corrosion inhibitor white powder in laboratory dish
VAMShield-90 industrial application in metalworking and hydraulic fluids
VAMShield-90 application in gear machining and metal cutting lubrication
VAMShield-90 advanced metal cutting and lubrication in precision milling machine

details.overview: VAMShield-90 is an advanced ash-free corrosion inhibitor designed for multi-metal systems and high-performance industrial fluid applications. It provides outstanding corrosion protection, excellent hard water compatibility, and superior efficiency even at low dosage levels.

specs.label: Foam Characteristics
specs.value: Extremely low foaming with excellent air release

specs.label: Efficiency
specs.value: Highly effective at very low dosage levels

solutions.title: SusPol-125
solutions.description: Bio-based, castor oil-derived solvent-free polyol engineered for exceptional flexibility, adhesion, and chemical resistance
features: Excellent balance of flexibility and toughness

sliderImages.alt: SusPol-125 bio-based castor oil polyol for sustainable coatings
SusPol-125 protective coating application on heavy steel construction beams

details.overview: SusPol-125 is a bio-based, castor oil-derived solvent-free polyol engineered to deliver exceptional flexibility, adhesion, and chemical resistance. Developed with sustainability at its core, it is an ideal solution for advanced coating and adhesive applications requiring high performance and environmental responsibility.

specs.label: Chemical Structure
specs.value: Contains both ether and ester functional groups

solutions.title: VAM RC-01
solutions.description: Advanced rust converter and corrosion prevention additive that converts rust into a stable protective layer
features: Converts existing rust into stable protective layer
Prevents further corrosion and rust propagation
Improves coating adhesion on rusted surfaces
Reduces need for extensive surface preparation
Compatible with various waterborne coating systems
Maintains performance on rusted and clean metal

sliderImages.alt: VAM RC-01 rust converter milky white liquid sample in laboratory beaker
VAM RC-01 rust converter brush application converting surface rust into a stable protective layer

details.overview: VAM RC-01 is an advanced rust converter and corrosion prevention additive that reacts directly with rust (ferric oxide) and converts it into a stable ferrous protective layer. It provides long-term passivation and enables effective coating application even on poorly prepared or rusted metal surfaces.

specs.label: Performance
specs.value: Works on both rusted and clean metal surfaces

solutions.title: VAM HS-100
solutions.description: Advanced multifunctional lubricant additive offering superior lime soap dispersion, emulsification, foam control, and corrosion inhibition

sliderImages.alt: VAM HS-100 lubricant additive for industrial applications and formulations

details.overview: VAM HS-100 is an advanced multifunctional lubricant additive designed for high-performance metalworking fluids and corrosion inhibitor formulations. It offers excellent lime soap dispersion, outstanding emulsification, effective foam control, and superior corrosion inhibition in industrial systems.

specs.label: Function
specs.value: Emulsification, foam control, and rust preventive

applications: Metal working fluids (mineral and vegetable oils)
